subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, drizzle-damp and streaked, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp softly reflects on the wet road, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex drizzle-damp with a faint sheen, colors slightly muted; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood faintly damp with drizzle
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A Latin-American commercial-strip intersection under a dim overcast sky with light drizzle. The worn asphalt is wet with a faint sheen, bearing a painted white stop line and lane markings, flanked by low colorful shopfronts and awnings. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Flat grey light and a faint wet sheen let the red lamp read clearly with a soft reflection on the pavement.

lighting.direction: Flat diffuse skylight through drizzle cloud
lighting.shadows: Faint, soft shadows; a weak wet sheen mirrors the red lamp and shopfront colors on the pavement
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat grey drizzle light with a faint wet sheen under which the illuminated red lamp reads clearly and softly reflects on the damp road

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the damp strip road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp above its faint reflection
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted-but-colorful palette of grey wet asphalt, faded shopfront hues, overcast sky, with the red lamp and balloons as brighter accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Damp, everyday, quietly lively, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, rows of awnings, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, red lamp, and overlapping drizzle-damp green balloon

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the drizzly commercial strip under dim overcast light, approaching the intersection where the red light glows above its faint wet reflection and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the drizzle-damp balloons continue to sway.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the commercial-strip intersection under dim drizzle; the single traffic light displays a steady red softly reflected on the wet road, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on worn wet asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping drizzle-damp balloon is clearly framed.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; drizzle-damp balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move in the damp breeze.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a drizzly Latin-American commercial strip under dim overcast light toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red with a soft reflection on the wet road, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the damp breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the drizzle-damp balloons still gently bobbing under flat grey light.
audio_description: Ambient commercial-strip sounds: light drizzle patter, distant street chatter and traffic, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Damp rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
